---
title: "Adverse Event Analysis — Summary"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

## Overview

This sub-project of the **HARMONY Terlipressin Registry** analyzes adverse events (AE) associated with terlipressin treatment in patients with hepatorenal syndrome-acute kidney injury (HRS-AKI) across 15 hospitals.

## Data Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[Parent Project: final_master_01282026.xlsx] --> B[Load & type-convert columns]
    B --> C[Derive AE variables]
    C --> D[Descriptive Tables]
    C --> E[Regression Models]
    C --> F[Subgroup Analyses]
    D --> G[CSV outputs in results/]
    E --> G
    F --> G
```

## Adverse Event Definitions

| Variable | Definition | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `any_ae` | Any adverse event | Binary |
| `abdominal_ae` | abdpain OR diarrhea OR nausea | Composite |
| `serious_ae` | respfail OR brady OR terli_7 OR terli_8 | Composite |
| `terli_ae_abdpain` | Abdominal pain | Individual |
| `terli_ae_nausea` | Nausea | Individual |
| `terli_ae_diarrhea` | Diarrhea | Individual |
| `terli_ae_volover` | Volume overload | Individual |
| `terli_ae_brady` | Bradycardia | Individual |
| `terli_ae_respfail` | Respiratory failure | Individual |
| `terli_7` | Ischemic event 1 | Individual |
| `terli_8` | Ischemic event 2 | Individual |

## Other Key Derived Variables

| Variable | Formula |
|---|---|
| `BMI` | `aki_weight / (aki_height/100)^2` |
| `meld_fda` | 1 if `coalesce(day0_meld, admit_meld, admit_meld_3) > 35` |
| `rrt_90days` | 1 if `days_to_rrt <= 90` |
| `lt_90days` | 1 if `time_to_transplant <= 90` |

## Analysis Summary

### 1. AE Incidence by Extended Criteria (Tables)

Stratified AE rates comparing standard vs. extended terlipressin criteria:

| Table | Stratification Variable |
|---|---|
| `table1_criteria_2.csv` | ACLF criteria (`criteria_2`) |
| `table1_criteria_3.csv` | sCr criteria (`criteria_3`) |
| `table1_criteria_4.csv` | Hypoxemia criteria (`criteria_4`) |

### 2. Baseline Characteristics by AE Type (Tables)

Full baseline characteristics stratified by AE occurrence:

| Table | Column Variable |
|---|---|
| `table1_any_ae.csv` | Any AE (`any_ae`) |
| `table1_abdominal_ae.csv` | Abdominal AE (`abdominal_ae`) |
| `table1_serious_ae.csv` | Serious AE (`serious_ae`) |
| `table1_terli_ae_respfail.csv` | Respiratory failure (`terli_ae_respfail`) |

### 2b. AE Cross-Tabulations (04/07/2026 Update)

New variables added to stratified tables:

| Variable | Definition |
|---|---|
| `comb_effusion_edema` | 4-level: 0=neither, 1=effusion only, 2=edema only, 3=both |
| `ratio_albumin_b4terli` | `totalalbumin_before_terli / aki_weight` |
| `ratio_albumin_total` | `total_albumin / aki_weight` |

New tables: `serious_ae` and `terli_ae_respfail` as column variables with AE cross-tabs.

::: {.callout-note}
Coding fix applied: For patients with `chest_imaging=1`, missing `chest_imaging_effusion` and `chest_imaging_pulmedema` are set to 0.
:::

### 3. Logistic Regression — Predictors of AE

- **Univariable**: `scr_terli_day0`, `respiratory_f`, `aclf_grade` → outcome `any_ae`
- **Multivariable (original)**: `aclf_grade + scr_terli_day0 + respiratory_f` → outcome `any_ae`
- **Multivariable (04/07/2026 update)**: `sex_male + inr_admit + akin + chest_imaging_effusion` → outcome `any_ae`

### 4. Competing Risk Models — 90-Day Mortality

**Univariable** (Fine-Gray, failcode=1 death):
All individual AE types + `serious_ae`

**Multivariable** (4 models):

| Model | Covariates |
|---|---|
| 1 | `any_ae + age + race + hispanic + admit_meld_3` *(updated 04/07/2026, was day0_meld)* |
| 2 | `any_ae + age + race + hispanic` |
| 3 | `serious_ae + age + race + hispanic + admit_meld_3` |
| 4 | `serious_ae + age + race + hispanic` |

### 5. Subgroup: ICU Admission

- **Cohort**: `location_terli_day0 == 1 OR 2`
- **Model**: Univariable logistic — `any_ae` → `icu_admit`

### 6. Subgroup: Transplant-Listed Patients

- **Cohort**: `listed_transplant == 1`
- **Model**: Univariable competing risk (failcode=2, transplant)
- **Covariates**: `any_ae`, `serious_ae`, `hrs_responders_cat_2`, `day0_meld`, `aclf_grade`, `meld_fda`

## Code Files

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `Adverse-event.Rmd` | Original analysis (01/2025 request) |
| `Adverse event 2026.Rmd` | Updated analysis (01/2026 request, adds `aclf_grade` recoding) |
| `code/Adverse-event.Rmd` | Copy in organized directory |

## Data Request History

| Date | File | Key Changes |
|---|---|---|
| 11/26/2025 | `requests/...11262025.docx` | Initial request: criteria tables, univariable AE predictors, 90-day survival |
| 01/12/2025 | `requests/...01122025.docx` | Added multivariable models, ICU subgroup, transplant subgroup |
| 01/18/2026 | `requests/...01182026.docx` | Reformatted as column/row specifications |
| 01/29/2026 | `requests/...01292026.docx` | Added `serious_ae` table, `terli_ae_respfail` table, Fine-Gray specification |
| **04/07/2026** | `requests/...04072026.docx` | New variables (`comb_effusion_edema`, albumin ratios), updated multivariate models, SAE cross-tabs — **IMPLEMENTED** |
